title: Level 9: Flexbox Basics
description: Elements ko control karne ka sabse powerful tool.
guide:
Flexbox Kya Hai?

Flexbox ek jaadu hai jo elements ko Row (Line) ya Column (Khamba) me arrange karta hai.

Bas Parent ko bolo display: flex; aur dekho kamaal!

Experiment: CSS me flex-direction: row; ko hatakar column likho.
